name: CentyPack Grading Summary
query:
SELECT
  r.name AS "Grading Run:Link/CentyPack Grading Run:200",
  r.posting_date AS "Date:Date:120",
  r.company AS "Company:Link/Company:160",
  r.block AS "Block:Link/Block:160",
  l.grade AS "Grade:Link/CentyPack Grade:120",
  l.defect_type AS "Defect:Link/CentyPack Defect Type:160",
  l.quantity_kg AS "Qty kg:Float:100",
  l.name AS "Line:Data:120"
FROM `tabCentyPack Grading Run` r
INNER JOIN `tabCentyPack Grading Line` l ON l.parent = r.name AND l.parenttype = 'CentyPack Grading Run'
ORDER BY r.posting_date DESC, r.name, l.idx
